name: Shield of Faith
description: +2 AC (concentration, 10 min)

name: Warding Bond
description: +1 AC and +1 to all saving throws (concentration)
expr: AC += 1; STR.SAVE += 1; DEX.SAVE += 1; CON.SAVE += 1; INT.SAVE += 1; WIS.SAVE += 1; CHA.SAVE += 1

name: Ceremony: Wedding
description: +2 AC for 7 days (two creatures)

name: Agile Parry
description: +2 AC while holding kensei weapon (until next turn)

name: Arcane Deflection
description: +2 AC (reaction, single attack) and +4 to all saves (reaction, single save)
expr: AC += 2; STR.SAVE += 4; DEX.SAVE += 4; CON.SAVE += 4; INT.SAVE += 4; WIS.SAVE += 4; CHA.SAVE += 4

name: Soul of the Forge
description: +1 AC while wearing heavy armor

name: Bladesong
description: +INT AC, +10 speed, advantage on Acrobatics (1 min)

name: Mage Armor
description: Base AC becomes 13 + DEX (8 hours, no armor)

name: Barkskin
description: AC can't be less than 17 (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Fighting Spirit
description: 5 temp HP + advantage on attacks (bonus action, 3/long rest)

name: Guardian of Nature: Great Tree
description: 10 temp HP, advantage on CON saves (concentration, 1 min)

name: Vitality of the Tree
description: Temp HP = your level (rage start)

name: Dark One's Blessing
description: Temp HP = CHA mod + warlock level (on reducing enemy to 0 HP)

name: Celestial Resilience
description: Temp HP = warlock level + CHA mod (short/long rest)

name: Touch of Death
description: Temp HP = WIS mod + monk level (on reducing enemy to 0 HP)

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: Temp HP = proficiency bonus (Dash as bonus action, Orc)

name: Armor of Agathys
description: 5 temp HP (+5 per slot level above 1st), deals cold damage to melee attackers

name: False Life
description: 1d4+4 temp HP (+5 per slot level above 1st)

name: Heroism
description: Temp HP = spellcasting ability mod at start of each turn (concentration). Set manually

name: Aid
description: +5 max HP and current HP (+5 per slot level above 2nd, 8 hours)

name: Longstrider
description: +10 ft speed (1 hour)

name: Blade Flourish
description: +10 ft speed (until end of turn)

name: Drunken Technique
description: +10 ft speed (Flurry of Blows, until end of turn)

name: Dread Ambusher
description: +10 ft speed (first turn of combat only)

name: Aura of Alacrity
description: +10 ft speed (aura, allies within 10 ft)

name: Guardian of Nature: Primal Beast
description: +10 ft speed, advantage on STR attacks, +1d6 force damage (concentration, 1 min)

name: Ashardalon's Stride
description: +20 ft speed, deals fire damage when moving (+5 per slot above 3rd, concentration)

name: Zephyr Strike
description: +30 ft speed on next turn, no opportunity attacks (concentration)

name: Large Form
description: +10 ft speed, become Large (bonus action, 10 min, Goliath)

name: Haste
description: Double speed, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, extra action (concentration, 1 min)

name: Steady Aim
description: Speed becomes 0, advantage on next attack (bonus action, Rogue)

name: Bless
description: +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws (concentration, 1 min). Dice bonus — apply result manually

name: Pass without Trace
description: +10 to Stealth checks (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Bear Totem Spirit
description: Resistance to all damage except Psychic while raging

name: Stoneskin
description: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Full of Stars
description: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing while in Starry Form

name: Stormborn
description: Resistance to cold, lightning, and thunder while Wrath of Sea is active

name: Superior Defense
description: Resistance to all damage except Force (1 min, 3 Focus Points)

name: Umbral Form
description: Resistance to all damage except Force and Radiant (6 Sorcery Points)

name: Fiendish Resilience
description: Resistance to one chosen damage type (until next short/long rest)

name: Steps of Night
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (bonus action, 1 min, Twilight Domain)

name: Draconic Flight
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (bonus action, 10 min, Dragonborn)

name: Celestial Revelation: Wings
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (1 min, Aasimar)

name: Power of the Wilds: Falcon
description: Fly speed equal to walking speed while raging (Path of Wild Heart)

name: Writhing Tide
description: 10 ft fly speed, hover (bonus action, 1 min, Swarmkeeper)

name: Rage Damage
description: +2 damage to STR melee attacks while raging (+3 at 9th, +4 at 16th)

name: Divine Favor
description: +1d4 radiant damage on weapon hits (concentration, 1 min)

name: Hunter's Mark
description: +1d6 force damage to marked target (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Magic Weapon
description: +1 to attack and damage (+2 at 4th-level slot, +3 at 6th, concentration, 1 hour)

name: Elemental Weapon
description: +1 to attack, +1d4 elemental damage (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Crusader's Mantle
description: +1d4 radiant damage for all allies in aura (concentration, 1 min)

name: Spirit Shroud
description: +1d8 damage within 10 ft (+1d8 per 2 slot levels above 3rd, concentration, 1 min)

name: Holy Weapon
description: +2d8 radiant damage on weapon hits (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Sneak Attack
description: +(level+1)/2 d6 damage once per turn (advantage or ally adjacent)

name: Divine Strike
description: +1d8 damage once per turn on weapon hit (+2d8 at 14th level)

name: Dreadful Strikes
description: +1d4 psychic damage once per turn on weapon hit (Fey Wanderer)

name: Mindless Rage
description: Immune to charmed and frightened while raging (Path of Berserker)

name: Form of Dread
description: Immune to frightened, temp HP = 1d10 + warlock level (bonus action, 1 min)

name: Enhance Ability
description: Advantage on one ability's checks (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Guidance
description: +1d4 to one ability check (cantrip, concentration). Dice bonus — apply result manually

name: Shield
description: +5 AC (reaction, until start of next turn)

name: Fizban's Platinum Shield
description: +2 AC, resistance to acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison (concentration, 1 min)

name: Tasha's Otherworldly Guise
description: AC = 10 + DEX + CHA, fly 40 ft, +2d8 damage (concentration, 1 min)

name: Alustriel's Mooncloak
description: Half cover (+2 AC), resistance to cold/lightning/radiant (concentration, 10 min)

name: Tenser's Transformation
description: 50 temp HP, advantage on weapon attacks, extra attack, +2d12 force damage (concentration, 10 min)

name: Syluné's Viper
description: 15 temp HP, climb speed (concentration, 1 min)

name: Motivational Speech
description: 5 temp HP, advantage on WIS saves (1 min, no concentration)

name: Power Word Fortify
description: 120 temp HP divided among up to 6 creatures. Set amount manually

name: Kinetic Jaunt
description: +10 ft speed, no opportunity attacks (concentration, 1 min)

name: Slow
description: -2 AC, -2 DEX saves, half speed (concentration, 1 min)

name: Blur
description: Disadvantage on attack rolls against you (concentration, 1 min)

name: Mirror Image
description: 3 duplicates absorb attacks (d6 roll: 3+ hits duplicate instead of you)

name: Sanctuary
description: Attackers must make WIS save or choose new target; ends if warded creature attacks (1 min)

name: Warding Wind
description: Ranged weapon attacks in/out have disadvantage, deafened in 10 ft radius (concentration, 10 min)

name: Fly
description: Fly speed 60 ft (concentration, 10 min)

name: Dragon's Breath
description: Target can exhale 15-ft cone for 3d6 damage of chosen type (concentration, 1 min)

name: Protection from Evil and Good
description: Aberrations/Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead have disadvantage on attacks; can't charm/frighten/possess (concentration, 10 min)

name: Protection from Energy
description: Resistance to one chosen type: Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Beacon of Hope
description: Advantage on WIS saves and death saves, max healing from any spell (concentration, 1 min)

name: Intellect Fortress
description: Resistance to psychic damage, advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Fire Shield: Warm
description: Resistance to cold damage, 2d8 fire to melee attackers (10 min, no concentration)

name: Fire Shield: Chill
description: Resistance to fire damage, 2d8 cold to melee attackers (10 min, no concentration)

name: Death Ward
description: First time you drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead (8 hours, no concentration)

name: Freedom of Movement
description: Can't be paralyzed or restrained, ignore difficult terrain, speed can't be reduced (1 hour)

name: Enlarge
description: +1d4 to weapon damage, advantage on STR checks and saves (concentration, 1 min)

name: Reduce
description: -1d4 to weapon damage, disadvantage on STR checks and saves (concentration, 1 min)

name: Dispel Evil and Good
description: Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead have disadvantage on attacks against you (concentration, 1 min)

name: Circle of Power
description: Advantage on saves vs. spells/magical effects, evasion vs. spell damage (concentration, 10 min)

name: Aura of Purity
description: Resistance to poison, advantage on saves vs. blinded/charmed/deafened/frightened/paralyzed/poisoned/stunned (concentration, 10 min)

name: Aura of Life
description: Resistance to necrotic damage, HP max can't be reduced, allies at 0 HP regain 1 HP (concentration, 10 min)

name: Investiture of Flame
description: Immunity to fire, resistance to cold (concentration, 10 min)

name: Investiture of Ice
description: Immunity to cold, resistance to fire (concentration, 10 min)

name: Investiture of Stone
description: Resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing (concentration, 10 min)

name: Investiture of Wind
description: Fly speed 60 ft, advantage on DEX saves, ranged attacks disadvantaged (concentration, 10 min)

name: Primordial Ward
description: Resistance to acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder; reaction to gain immunity to one (concentration, 1 min)

name: Songal's Elemental Suffusion
description: Resistance to one chosen type: Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder, 4d6 pulse damage (concentration, 10 min)

name: Heroes' Feast
description: Immunity to frightened/poisoned, resistance to poison, advantage on WIS saves (24 hours)

name: Holy Aura
description: Advantage on all saves, disadvantage on attack rolls against you (concentration, 1 min)

name: Mind Blank
description: Immunity to psychic damage and charmed condition (24 hours)

name: Foresight
description: Advantage on all d20 tests, disadvantage on attacks against you (8 hours, no concentration)

name: Feign Death
description: Resistance to all damage except psychic, immunity to poisoned, speed 0, incapacitated (1 hour)

name: Shadow Blade
description: Conjured shadow sword: 2d8 psychic, finesse, light, thrown; advantage in dim light/darkness (concentration, 1 min)

name: Flame Blade
description: Conjured fire blade: 3d6 + ability mod fire damage as Magic action (concentration, 10 min)

name: Flame Arrows
description: +1d6 fire damage to ammunition (up to 12 pieces, concentration, 1 hour)

name: Swift Quiver
description: 2 bonus action attacks with bow/crossbow each turn (concentration, 1 min)

name: Fount of Moonlight
description: Resistance to radiant, +2d6 radiant to melee attacks, reaction to blind attackers (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Darkvision
description: Darkvision 150 ft (8 hours)

name: Spider Climb
description: Climb speed equal to walking speed, walk on ceilings (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Invisibility
description: Invisible until attacking, dealing damage, or casting a spell (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Greater Invisibility
description: Invisible, does not break on attacking or casting (concentration, 1 min)

name: Protection from Poison
description: Advantage on saves vs. Poisoned, resistance to poison damage (1 hour)

name: Blink
description: 50% chance to vanish to Ethereal Plane at end of each turn (1 min)

name: Polymorph
description: Transform into a Beast of CR ≤ your level (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Gaseous Form
description: Become a misty cloud, fly speed 10 ft, can pass through tiny gaps (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Alter Self
description: Aquatic adaptation (swim speed + gills), change appearance, or natural weapons 1d6 (concentration, 10 min)

name: Levitate
description: Rise 20 ft and hover, move only by pushing/pulling (concentration, 10 min)

name: Jump
description: Jump up to 30 ft by spending 10 ft of movement (1 min)

name: Feather Fall
description: Up to 5 creatures descend at 60 ft/round, no fall damage (1 min)

name: Water Breathing
description: Up to 10 creatures can breathe underwater (24 hours)

name: Water Walk
description: Up to 10 creatures can walk on liquid surfaces (1 hour)

name: Expeditious Retreat
description: Dash as bonus action each turn (concentration, 10 min)

name: Borrowed Knowledge
description: Gain proficiency in one skill you lack (1 hour)

name: Skill Empowerment
description: Gain Expertise (double proficiency) in one skill you're proficient in (concentration, 1 hour)

name: Fortune's Favor
description: One-time extra d20 on attack, check, or save — choose which to use

name: Nondetection
description: Can't be targeted by Divination spells or magical scrying (8 hours)

name: Grappled
description: Speed is 0, can't benefit from speed bonuses

name: Restrained
description: Speed is 0, disadvantage on attacks and DEX saves, attacks against have advantage

name: Paralyzed
description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage, melee hits are crits

name: Stunned
description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage

name: Petrified
description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, resistance to all damage

name: Unconscious
description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage, melee hits are crits

name: Prone
description: Disadvantage on attacks, melee attacks have advantage, ranged have disadvantage. Half movement to stand

name: Blinded
description: Can't see, auto-fail checks requiring sight, attacks have disadvantage, attacks against have advantage

name: Charmed
description: Can't attack the charmer, charmer has advantage on social checks

name: Deafened
description: Can't hear, auto-fail checks requiring hearing

name: Frightened
description: Disadvantage on ability checks and attacks while source of fear is in line of sight

name: Incapacitated
description: Can't take actions or reactions

name: Invisible
description: Attacks have advantage, attacks against have disadvantage

name: Poisoned
description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks

name: Exhaustion 1
description: Disadvantage on ability checks

name: Exhaustion 2
description: Disadvantage on ability checks, speed halved

name: Exhaustion 3
description: Disadvantage on ability checks, attacks, and saves, speed halved

name: Exhaustion 4
description: Disadvantage on ability checks, attacks, and saves, speed and max HP halved

name: Exhaustion 5
description: Disadvantage on ability checks, attacks, and saves, speed 0, max HP halved
